title: selaginella dalzellii
intro: Selaginella dalzellii, also known as the spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella dalzellii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestive health, while also being used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
